task.en:
Open Notes and create a new note titled exactly `System Snapshot`. Read the current values from System Settings → General → About and record exactly these THREE lines in the body (one per line, in this order):
```
Model: <model name, e.g. MacBook Pro>
macOS: <version, e.g. 14.5>
Memory: <NN GB>
```
Get `Model` and `Memory` from the About page, and `macOS` from the version shown on the same page. Do not add any other notes.

pre_command: tccutil reset AppleEvents com.apple.Notes 2>/dev/null; killall -9 Notes osascript 2>/dev/null; UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 4; open -gj -a Notes 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: N=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$N" | grep -qi 'System Snapshot' && echo True || echo False

NBSP=$(printf '\302\240'); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null | sed -e 's/<[^>]*>/ /g' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed "s/$NBSP/ /g" | tr -s ' \t'); printf '%s' "$BODY" | grep -qiE 'model:[[:space:]]*[a-z]' && echo True || echo False

NBSP=$(printf '\302\240'); V=$(sw_vers -productVersion 2>/dev/null); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null | sed -e 's/<[^>]*>/ /g' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed "s/$NBSP/ /g" | tr -s ' \t'); printf '%s' "$BODY" | grep -qF "$V" && echo True || echo False

NBSP=$(printf '\302\240'); R=$(( $(sysctl -n hw.memsize 2>/dev/null) / 1073741824 )); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null | sed -e 's/<[^>]*>/ /g' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed "s/$NBSP/ /g" | tr -s ' \t'); printf '%s' "$BODY" | grep -qiE "memory:[^0-9]*${R} *gb" && echo True || echo False
